# Web Effects — LLM Skills Index

This directory contains animation and scroll-effects skills for AI coding agents.

## Skills

### GSAP (GreenSock Animation Platform)
- gsap/skills/gsap-core/SKILL.md — Core tweens, easing, stagger, matchMedia
- gsap/skills/gsap-timeline/SKILL.md — Timeline sequencing, labels, position parameter
- gsap/skills/gsap-scrolltrigger/SKILL.md — Scroll-linked animation, scrub, pin, snap
- gsap/skills/gsap-plugins/SKILL.md — Flip, Draggable, MorphSVG, SplitText, DrawSVG, Physics2D
- gsap/skills/gsap-react/SKILL.md — useGSAP hook, gsap.context(), React cleanup
- gsap/skills/gsap-performance/SKILL.md — GPU compositing, will-change, profiling
- gsap/skills/gsap-utils/SKILL.md — gsap.utils helpers
- gsap/skills/gsap-supercharged/SKILL.md — Cinematic scroll storytelling, advanced patterns

### ScrollReveal
- scrollreveal/skills/scrollreveal-core/SKILL.md — Core reveal() API, all config options
- scrollreveal/skills/scrollreveal-advanced/SKILL.md — Orchestration, dynamic content, Next.js

### Trigger.js
- triggerjs/skills/triggerjs-core/SKILL.md — CSS variable scroll binding, tg-* attributes

### WOW.js
- wow/skills/wow-core/SKILL.md — Animate.css on scroll, init(), data-wow-* attributes

### React Reveal
- react-reveal/skills/react-reveal-core/SKILL.md — Declarative React scroll animation components

## Master Index
- SKILL.md — Library selector, decision tree, comparison matrix

## Sources
- gsap/src/ — GSAP 3 source (Greensock)
- gsap/dist/ — GSAP 3 distribution builds + all plugins
- scrollreveal/src/ — ScrollReveal source
- triggerjs/src/ — Trigger.js source
- wow/src/ — WOW.js source
- react-reveal/src/ — React Reveal source
